title: Run Powerful AI Locally: The Future is 18 Months Away! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof predicts that small, open-source language models will run locally on consumer hardware within 18 months to 2 years. This shift would reduce cloud dependence and decentralize AI processing.
writeup: Cyril Imhof predicts that small, open-source language models will run locally on consumer hardware within 18 months to 2 years. The claim matters because local inference would reduce dependence on cloud providers and decentralize AI processing. The takeaway is a projected shift from cloud-hosted large models toward compact models running on personal devices.
